name: Bhai Jaspreet Singh (Fatehgarh Sahib)
body: Bhai Jaspreet Singh hails from Fatehgarh Sahib and belongs to a family of very talented rababi musicians. His uncles are Sardool Sikander and the late Gamdoor Aman.  Many aren’t aware that Sardool Sikander Ji performed Kirtan with his brothers some 30 years ago. I will be uploading a rare Asa Di Vaar recording of theirs from that era which is absolutely magnificent. Their influence can be heard in Bhai Jaspreet Singh’s style of singing. He has a melodious voice that is very well suited for semi classical singing. He sang a thumri for me while having a conversation and it was amazing. Sadly, I did not record it. Bhai Jaspreet Singh has a younger brother, Bhai Manpreet Singh who is equally talented but unfortunately was not able to accompany him during his trip to Malaysia. The Shabad ‘Prem Bhatola’ is a composition by Sardool Ji and was sung with great emotion by Bhai Jaspreet Singh. Accompanying him on rabab and taus are Bhai Mahaveer Singh and Bhai Siripal Singh respectively.

An anecdote about the recordings below. It was Vaisakhi 2016 and I was very busy with exams for my masters which resulted in me missing the entire Vaisakhi samagam. Feeling left out, I went to Sabha House as soon as my exams were over. Four jathas were accommodated in Sabha House at that time and they happily obliged me with a full day of Kirtan from morning until night. The jathas were Bhai Jaspreet Singh, Bhai Gurfateh Singh Shant, Bhai Satvinder Singh Sartaj and Bhai Siripal Singh. I am extremely grateful for their kindness and for allowing me to share these beautiful recordings. I shall upload the other jathas’ recordings on separate pages dedicated to each jatha. If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Jaspreet Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
